sections.paragraph:
ἐπαϰολουϑέω [ἐπί, ἀκολουθέω] ‘be in close association with what precedes’, follow, in NT only metaphorically:

—a. of misdeeds being in close pursuit 1 Ti 5:24.

—b. of confirmatory signs that follow on top of the proclaimed word Mk 16:20.

—c. of exemplary life used as a model 1 Pt 2:21.

—d. of good behavior as an objective παντὶ ἔργῳ ἀγαϑῷ ἐ. devote/attend to every good deed 1 Ti 5:10.
